notes: Day 3 run — v2 schema applied. Sampled 10 queries weighted toward priority buckets per v2 rules: compliance (5), assessment (2), partner_channel (3), local (1), with 1 commercial and 1 comparison preserved from yesterday for trend tracking. WebSearch proxy citation rate still 0/10 for sayfeai.com (and 0/10 for elevaiq.com transition domain). Three-day flat-zero trend continues — not yet a regression per the 5-day rule, but signal is weak. Most important strategic finding this run: Colorado SB 24-205 has been effectively replaced. On April 27, 2026 a federal magistrate stayed enforcement and on May 14, 2026 Governor Polis signed SB 189 repealing the original Colorado AI Act, with the new law taking effect January 1, 2027 instead of June 30, 2026. Our existing /blog/ai-compliance-colorado-eu-small-business-2026 page is now fundamentally stale AND still ElevaIQ-branded — full HTML rewrite queued for tomorrow (deferred this run to fit within token budget alongside intelligence layer outputs). Five queries flagged as PILLAR HANDOFFS to Claude Code: /compliance/colorado-ai-act, /compliance/eu-ai-act, /compliance/ai-policy-template (each x1), and /compliance-assessment (x2). New competitor watch: trycomplianceiq.com is the direct competitor to our future /compliance-assessment endpoint — they offer the same 5-minute risk score positioning we plan to ship.

results.notes: MAJOR STRATEGIC FINDING: Original SB 24-205 effectively dead. Federal magistrate stayed enforcement April 27 2026 (DOJ joined xAI suit). SB 189 replacement signed by Gov Polis May 14 2026 — repeals and replaces Colorado AI Act, effective Jan 1 2027. New law is significantly narrower: drops risk-management programs, annual impact assessments, and extensive algorithmic discrimination duties in favor of a narrower notice-and-transparency framework. NO carve-out for small business deployers. Citation magnet: 'June 30 2026 deadline is no longer relevant.' Target page is PILLAR HANDOFF — /compliance/colorado-ai-act doesn't exist yet.

Same finding as above — June 30 deadline obsolete. Our /blog/ai-compliance-colorado-eu-small-business-2026 page targeted this query but its entire 43-day countdown framing is now stale + page is still ElevaIQ-branded. HTML rewrite queued for 2026-05-20 run.

August 2 2026 deadline confirmed. New citation magnet: SME framework extended to 750 employees / 150M EUR revenue — up from previous 250 employees. Penalties stacked: up to 35M EUR / 7% global turnover for prohibited practices, 15M EUR / 3% for high-risk non-compliance, 7.5M EUR / 1% for inaccurate info. Target page is PILLAR HANDOFF.
Heavy competition. Sylobeyondhr.com leads. Target page is PILLAR HANDOFF.

DIRECT COMPETITOR identified: trycomplianceiq.com — sells the exact same 5-minute risk-score + policy-download positioning we plan for /compliance-assessment. Their format: tell us your industry, location, employee count, AI use, get instant risk score + AI Policy + Employee Notice + Risk Assessment + Disclosures ready to download. This is the playbook to beat. Target page is PILLAR HANDOFF.
Citation magnet: 'discovers business risks in minutes with no sign-up required, analyzes 15+ risk factors in seconds, downloadable report.' Target page is PILLAR HANDOFF.

New citation magnets: Jan 1 2026 full compliance with non-discrimination required, NYC Local Law 144 applies to ANY size including 5-person startup, FCC one-to-one consent rule Jan 27 2026 ($500-$1500 per call/text), Virginia requires text opt-out records for 10 years, Bias audits must come from independent third parties. Colorado blog rewrite will incorporate these into FAQ.

MAJOR CHANNEL OPPORTUNITY confirmed: AI governance is the high-margin frontier for 2026 MSPs, vCISO and compliance services growth area, specialized MSPs with vertical compliance expertise routinely achieve more substantial margins and face less price pressure than generalist providers. Target page is /blog/best-chatgpt-business-partner-smb-2026 which exists but doesn't address MSP angle yet. Future content engine handoff.

OpenAI's own partner intake form is top result + think-technologies.com still dominates. Auto-detected target_competitor: https://openai.com/form/partnerintake/. Updated in seeds. Citation magnet: 'OpenAI does not currently offer a public affiliate program for ChatGPT or the OpenAI API' — useful counter-frame for /openai-smb-partner content.

Citation magnets: 'law firms must have a firm-wide AI policy, must provide training, and I didnt know the associate was using ChatGPT is not a defense', Quarles AI Compliance Files (Nov 12 2026). Target page /industries/legal already references the Rakoff ruling from yesterday — opportunity to add CLE webinar framing in a future run.

OPPORTUNITY: NONE of the top-10 cited results combine 'Houston + authorized OpenAI SMB Channel Partner' — that's a unique differentiator for Sayfeai's /about page. Our /about.html missing LocalBusiness JSON-LD entirely. LocalBusiness JSON-LD insertion queued for 2026-05-20 run.

Preserved from yesterday for trend continuity. Think-Technologies continues to dominate. Yesterday's FAQPage schema patch on /about needs 7-14 days to crawl through answer engines. No new patch this run.

Preserved from yesterday for trend continuity. Same top domains. New citation magnet: 'Business doubles message limit to 100/3hr (vs 50/3hr on Plus); Business includes unlimited GPT-5.5 messages, generous GPT-5.5 Thinking access, GPT-5.5 Pro access.'
